def negative_function_returns_multiple_unlabeled_shape_variants():
    rule_id = "function_returns_multiple_unlabeled_shape_variants"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag functions that return unrelated tuple or dict shapes depending on the path taken."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
